headline: Coinbase, Kalshi's New Crypto Futures Send These Stocks Sprawling
summary: Coinbase, Kalshi launch perpetual futures backed by the CFTC. Cboe, CME, ICE stock tumble on the news.

headline: Coinbase Global to Unlock U.S. Crypto Derivatives Opportunity?
summary: COIN rolls out regulated crypto derivatives for U.S. traders, leveraging Deribit to chase a market that drives about 80% of global crypto volume.

headline: Strategy Crashes 10%, Coinbase Falls 6% as Bitcoin Breaks $70,000 Floor in Day-Two Selloff
summary: Shares of Strategy (NASDAQ:MSTR) are down 10% in mid-morning trading Tuesday, while Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) stock is off 6%. The catalyst is the tape under both names: Bitcoin (CRYPTO:BTC) has broken below $70,000. Strategy stock is trading around $135 after a Monday close of $149.78. Coinbase stock is changing hands near $172 versus Monday’s $182.61 close. ... Strategy Crashes 10%, Coinbase Falls 6% as Bitcoin Breaks $70,000 Floor in Day-Two Selloff

headline: Kevin O'Leary Says The Biggest Crypto Opportunity May Be Hiding Inside S&P 500
summary: Influential investor and media personality Kevin O’Leary said on Monday that the “next big thing” in cryptocurrency would be determined by its adoption across different sectors of the S&P 500.
